title: North American Clean Fuels Market: Month-in-Review October 2024
content:
Key Highlights

Canada CFR
  • In October, average bid and offer prices for Canada CFR CC3 and CC2 saw declines, with CC3 bids down 28.57% and offers down 16.67%. CC2 bids fell 27.73%, while offers decreased 24.79%.
CA LCFS
  • CA LCFS average Type 1 monthly credit price rose 9.83% MoM in October.
  • Monthly credit transactions declined further by 87.06% MoM in October.
  • The average broker prices moved from $64.92/MT on 1st October to $62.33/MT on 29th October.
BC LCFS
  • BC LCFS monthly trading witnessed a 130.38x times rise in September.
  • The average credit price under BC LCFS continued to rise by 31.34% MoM, reaching $336.72.
OR CFP
  • In September, OR CFP average credit prices decreased by 69.60% compared to August, far behind the $100 mark.
  • OR CFP trading activity in September saw a 1.48x times rise as 209.71k credits were transferred.
WA CFS
  • Average credit prices in WA CFS continued to increase and witnessed a 14.78% rise MoM.
  • For September, a total of 84,774 credits were traded across 15 transfers.
US RFS
  • In September, D3 and D6 RIN Prices remained stable while D4 and D5 Prices increased.
  • RIN Generation declined by 7.61% and transaction volumes of RINs rose by 14.10% MoM.
author: Mansift Kaur
